name: MTU Aero Engines AG
description: MTU Aero Engines AG is a leading German aircraft engine manufacturer. The company develops, manufactures, and provides service support for military and civil aircraft engines. MTU is known for its advanced technology in low-pressure turbines, high-pressure compressors, turbine center frames, as well as manufacturing processes and repair techniques. It also offers comprehensive maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for commercial aircraft engines.
